results.name: halloween
results.description: A just-for-fun tag featuring things with a Halloween mood. See also [spooky].

results.name: halo (circle of light)
results.description: A ring of light that usually sits above the head of a holy figure.

results.name: halo glass
results.description: A glass filled with the magical Halo substance from New Capenna.

results.name: halo (substance)
results.description: An iridescent magical substance found in New Capenna.

results.name: hama (avatar)
results.description: Nice old lady by day. Ruthless and vengeful bloodbender by night.

results.name: hame
results.description: A feline nurse from New Earth.

results.name: hammer
results.description: A tool for applying a large force to a small area all at once. 🔨

results.name: hand
results.description: Depicts a hand entering from out of frame.

results.name: hand disruption
results.description: Mess with your opponent's hand.

results.name: hand from the earth
results.description: A hand reaching from under the earth, usually attached to fresh undead.

results.name: hand mouth
results.description: Mouth in the hand? Mouth in the hand.

results.name: hand-negative
results.description: Spell and abilities that leave you with less cards in hand after resolving.

results.name: hand-neutral
results.description: Spell and abilities that leave you with the same amount of cards in hand after resolving.

results.name: hand-positive
results.description: Spells and abilities that leave you with more cards in hand after resolving.

results.name: hand size increase
results.description: Cards that increase the maximum amount of cards you can hold.

results.name: hanged figure
results.description: Someone hung from a noose. May be a warning.

results.name: hanging indentation
results.description: Text indented on all but the first line of a paragraph.

results.name: hank
results.description: Character from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon series.

results.name: harbin
results.description: The son of Urza and Kayla bin-Kroog.

results.name: harmonic
results.description: Cards that care about artifacts and enchantments separately.

results.name: harnfel
results.description: Birgi's horn.

results.name: haru
results.description: A young earthbender featured in the Avatar: The Last Airbender episode "Imprisoned"

results.name: hashaton
results.description: The lazotep servant of the Scarab God.

results.name: has identical token
results.description: A token exists that's identical to these cards, except for CMC. See more: [token versions of cards](/tags/card/token-versions-of-cards).

results.name: hat
results.description: Clothing worn on the head.

results.name: hate
results.description: Cards that hate on things — colors, card types, zones, etc.
